user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
Hi [Customer Name],

I wanted to follow up on your recent ticket and make sure everything is still working as expected since we marked it resolved a few days ago.

If you’re still all set, no action is needed. If the issue has come back or anything else is not quite right, just reply here and I’ll be happy to help.

Best,  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly fulfilled the user's request by providing a well-structured draft that follows the persona's communication guidelines.
